user.title: Set up JamVue
user.description:
JamVue will POST to Home Assistant whenever a vinyl track is identified.

Copy the appropriate webhook URL below into JamVue's webhook settings, then submit. Use the **External** URL if JamVue runs in the cloud; use **Internal** only if JamVue is on your local network.

{webhook_urls}

_Need this URL again later? Open **Settings → Devices & Services → JamVue → Configure**, or search your logs for "JamVue webhook"._

abort.single_instance_allowed: JamVue is already configured. Only one instance is allowed.

init.title: JamVue webhook URL
init.description:
Paste the appropriate URL into JamVue's webhook settings. Use the **External** URL if JamVue runs in the cloud; use **Internal** only if JamVue is on your local network.

{webhook_urls}

data_description.base_url: Leave blank to use Home Assistant's detected URLs. Set this to force a specific address, e.g. https://homeassistant.example.com — it will be shown first above. Clear it to revert.
